name: Ahmed Barakat
subject: Arabic Teacher
message: لقد ,ملكتم جزءا من القلب بجمال روحكم وذوقكم فخور بكم وأتمنى لكم الافضل دائما

name: Khulood Youssri
subject: English Teacher
message:
To my incredible graduates,

Watching you reach this milestone fills my heart with so much pride. The journey wasn't always easy — there were long nights, hard lessons, and moments of doubt — but you showed up, you pushed through, and here you are.

What you've accomplished goes far beyond a diploma. You've grown in ways you may not even fully see yet. The curiosity you've developed, the resilience you've built, and the person you've become — that is the real achievement.

As you step into this next chapter, know that you carry with you everything you need. Trust yourself. Be kind to yourself along the way. And never stop learning.

It has been one of the greatest honors of my life to be part of your story. I will be cheering for you — always.

My lovely students, congratulations to you all. I will really miss you sooooo much.

I will miss you all.
Really, you were and will always be a part of my life. I will never forget you, and I hope you will never forget your Miss. Love you all.

❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️💖💖
💋💋💋💋💋💋💋💋

With so much pride and love,

Your English Teacher,
Khokha.

name: Nermeen Darwish
subject: English Teacher
message:
To My Amazing Students,

It has been a pleasure teaching you and watching you grow.

May your future be filled with success, happiness, and endless opportunities.

The future belongs to those who believe in their dreams.

Keep learning, keep growing, and keep shining.

So proud of you all.

Congratulations! ✨

name: Doaa Samir
subject: Math Teacher
message:
I truly hope I have fulfilled my mission as your teacher and was a gentle presence in your lives.

Please always remember me fondly, and know that I am so proud of the memories and moments we shared together.

name: Mostafa Mohamed
subject: Deutsch Teacher
message: Ihr seid immer in meinem Herz.Ihr wart eine der besten Gruppe in meinem Arbeitsleben.

name: Areej Osama
subject: Chemistry Teacher
message:
My dear seniors ❤️

Two years went by much faster than I expected. You have been a big part of my days, and teaching you has truly been one of the best parts of my job.

I’m so proud of how much you’ve grown, and I wish each one of you all the success and happiness in the future.

Good luck with everything ahead, and don’t forget your Chemistry teacher. 🤍

name: Heba Zannoun
subject: Social Studies Teacher
message: بحبكم كتير ولادى الحلوين يارب موفقين دايما يارب اشوفكم على خير احلى أطباء ومهندسين و دايما مميزين  بحبكم يا ولاد وبنات ❤️❤️❤️

name: Suzan Sayed
subject: Psychology Teacher
message:
وحشتوني كلكم يا حبايبي 🤍

بحبكم من كل قلبي، بينا ذكريات جميلة مش ممكن أنساها.

بتمنالكم مستقبل يليق بيكم وبمجهودكم، ومستنية أفرح بكلياتكم.

دي أول حياة الكبار ❤️😂، وانتوا قدها إن شاء الله.

خليكم فاكرين دايمًا إنكم هتقدروا لو آمنتوا بقدراتكم.

أشوفكم على خير.

ميس سوزي ❤️❤️❤️❤️

name: Mohamed Abu Bakr
subject: Arabic Teacher
message:
أفضل دفعة درست لها وأول دفعة دخلت قلبي بصراحة.

الدفعة اللي بتشرح لها وأنت حاسس إنك أب مع أولاده، مش مجرد مدرس.

أدب وعلم وأخلاق وحسن تربية، وفوق كل ده شطارة وتميز.

دفعة مش هتتكرر أبدًا.

مش عايز أقول أسماء خوفًا من إني أنسى حد، بس كلكم من أفضل وأحسن الطلاب اللي قابلتهم خلال مسيرتي التعليمية.

وأنا بفتخر بيكم على طول، وهفضل فخور لمجرد إني كان ليا الشرف إني أدرّس لكم.
